target: 7. Shinpei's Work
July 24th

(Managed to make it before opening…
But I feel reluctant to go inside)

(Ended up not talking to Ushio at all since then,
and I worried Mio and Alain)
I'll clean outside the store.
Ah, Shinpei!
Ah… Mio, good morning.
Good morning!

What's wrong? Why are you here so early?
Didn't you have family time today?
They told me to go help with the Kofune.

It's a festival today, so there'll be more customers
than usual, right?

Really?
Hehe, that's a big help!

I ditched work yesterday when it was busy,
and I couldn't help at all…
I'm determined to work hard today.

It seems like they're preparing inside.
What should I do?

Hmm… 
There's one troublesome task.
Can you wake up my sister?
Huh?

I mean, they might already be up,
but they're locked in their room and won't come out.
They don't answer even when I call…

They were like that yesterday too,
so I'm scared to open the door.
So, please!
Hey, that's probably not something I should do…

No, Shinpei, only you can do this!
It's especially busy today,
so make sure to wake them up properly!
No way, that's too much!

Then I'll leave it to you!
Ah, so busy!
Hey, Mio…!
Hah, I'm in trouble…

(But I can't delay this any longer
than I already have…)
(I need to just get it over with…)
(When I got to their room…)

(It's strangely quiet.
Is she really still asleep?)

Ushio, wake up.
You'll be busy today too, right?
(It's strange there's no sound at all)
(What if… they're already up and watching us?)

Ah… Ushio, can you hear me?
I came to help today too.

When are you going back?
You didn't even tell me…
I'm really sorry.
Please say something.
Hey, are you still angry?
…Ushio?
(If it were normal Ushio, she'd have said something by now…)
(What if…?)

Ushio, I'm opening the door!
If you don't want me to, answer!
Okay? I'm opening it?

…Yeah.
They're not here.
(What if…?)
